seoTitle: Integrate Facebook Lead Ads With HubSpot Easily
metaDescription: Connect Facebook Lead Ads to HubSpot to sync leads automatically, from Meta permissions and OAuth to mapping form fields into CRM properties.
intro: Facebook Lead Ads can feed directly into HubSpot so new leads land in your CRM the moment someone submits a form, without manual exports. This guide covers checking your Meta Business Suite permissions, authorizing the connection, and mapping form fields to the right CRM properties. It finishes with syncing your pages and lead forms so ingestion runs in real time.

steps.heading: Check Meta permissions
steps.body: Confirm you have administrative rights and page ownership set up correctly inside Meta Business Suite.

steps.heading: Open Ads settings in HubSpot
steps.body: Go to Settings, then Marketing, and select the Ads configuration tab.

steps.heading: Connect your Facebook account
steps.body: Click Connect Account and choose Facebook from the network options.

steps.heading: Complete the OAuth handshake
steps.body: Pass through the Meta OAuth gateway, review permissions, and confirm the account link.

steps.heading: Sync your pages and forms
steps.body: Switch to the Lead Syncing tab to view connected pages and select the active lead capture forms.

steps.heading: Map your form fields
steps.body: Enable the marketing contacts toggle and map custom fields so responses route into matching CRM parameters.

faq.question: Do I need to be a page admin to connect Facebook Lead Ads?
faq.answer: Yes, you need administrative rights and page ownership set correctly in Meta Business Suite before connecting.

faq.question: Will leads sync automatically once connected?
faq.answer: Yes, after mapping your forms and enabling the sync, new lead submissions flow into HubSpot in real time.

faq.question: Can I map custom Facebook form questions to HubSpot fields?
faq.answer: Yes, the field mapping step lets you match specific form questions to the matching CRM properties.

faq.question: How do I test that the integration is working?
faq.answer: You can trigger a test run through the Meta Lead Ads testing component after saving your configuration.
